Sql: SELECT COALESCE(TRY_CAST('2020-01-01' AS TIMESTAMP), TRY_STRPTIME(CAST('2020-01-01' AS VARCHAR), ['%-d.%-m.%Y, %H:%M:%S', '%-d.%-m.%Y %H:%M:%S', '%-d.%-m.%Y', '%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y', '%d-%b-%y %H:%M:%S', '%d-%b-%Y %H:%M:%S', '%d %b %Y %H:%M:%S', '%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'])) AS dt1, COALESCE(TRY_CAST('2020-01-01T13:45:00Z' AS TIMESTAMP), TRY_STRPTIME(CAST('2020-01-01T13:45:00Z' AS VARCHAR), ['%-d.%-m.%Y, %H:%M:%S', '%-d.%-m.%Y %H:%M:%S', '%-d.%-m.%Y', '%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y', '%d-%b-%y %H:%M:%S', '%d-%b-%Y %H:%M:%S', '%d %b %Y %H:%M:%S', '%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'])) AS dt2, COALESCE(TRY_CAST('not a date' AS TIMESTAMP), TRY_STRPTIME(CAST('not a date' AS VARCHAR), ['%-d.%-m.%Y, %H:%M:%S', '%-d.%-m.%Y %H:%M:%S', '%-d.%-m.%Y', '%m/%d/%Y %I:%M:%S %p', '%m/%d/%Y %H:%M:%S', '%m/%d/%Y', '%d-%b-%y %H:%M:%S', '%d-%b-%Y %H:%M:%S', '%d %b %Y %H:%M:%S', '%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'])) AS dt3

Kql: datatable(t:datetime)[ datetime(2020-01-01), datetime(2021-06-15 12:30:00) ] | extend asl = tolong(t), asr = todouble(t)
Sql: SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(t AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(t AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS asl, COALESCE(TRY_CAST(t AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(t AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS asr FROM (VALUES (TIMESTAMP '2020-01-01 00:00:00'), (TIMESTAMP '2021-06-15 12:30:00')) AS t(t)

Kql: print span = totimespan("1d"), aslong = tolong(1d), asdouble = todouble(1h)
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST('1d' AS INTERVAL) AS span, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST((86400000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS aslong, COALESCE(TRY_CAST((3600000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond') AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST((3600000 * INTERVAL '1 millisecond') AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS asdouble

Kql: datatable(r:real)[ 2.9, -2.9, 2.5, -2.5, 3.5 ] | extend ti = toint(r), tl = tolong(r)
Sql: SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(r AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(r AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS ti, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(r AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(r AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS tl FROM (VALUES (CAST(2.9 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(-2.9 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(2.5 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(-2.5 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(3.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(r)

Kql: print round1 = toint(2.5), round2 = toint(3.5), round3 = toint(-2.5), round4 = toint(2.9)
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(2.5 AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(2.5 AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS round1, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(3.5 AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(3.5 AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS round2, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST((-2.5) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST((-2.5) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS round3, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(2.9 AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(2.9 AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS round4

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "1.5e10", "0.0001", "-0", "1_000", "Inf", "NaN", "0b101" ] | extend d = todouble(s)
Sql: SELECT *, COALESCE(TRY_CAST(s AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(s AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS d FROM (VALUES ('1.5e10'), ('0.0001'), ('-0'), ('1_000'), ('Inf'), ('NaN'), ('0b101')) AS t(s)

Kql: print bool2int = toint(true), bool2int2 = toint(false), bool2str = tostring(true)
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(TRUE AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUE AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS bool2int, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(FALSE AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(FALSE AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS bool2int2, TRY_CAST(TRUE AS TEXT) AS bool2str

Kql: print intdiv = 7 / 2 * 2, order = 7 * 2 / 4, mixed = 7 / 2.0 * 2
Sql: SELECT CAST(TRUNC(CAST(7 AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(2, 0)) AS BIGINT) * 2 AS intdiv, CAST(TRUNC(CAST(7 * 2 AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(4, 0)) AS BIGINT) AS order, 7 / 2.0 * 2 AS mixed

Kql: datatable(i:int, j:int)[ 10,0, -10,0, 0,0 ] | extend dz = i / j, mz = i % j
Sql: SELECT *, CAST(TRUNC(CAST(i AS DOUBLE) / NULLIF(j, 0)) AS BIGINT) AS dz, (((i) % NULLIF(j, 0)) + ABS(j)) % NULLIF(j, 0) AS mz FROM (VALUES (10, 0), (-10, 0), (0, 0)) AS t(i, j)
SELECT 1.5E+300 * 1.5E+300 AS sci, 1E-300 * 1E-300 AS tiny

Kql: datatable(d:decimal)[ decimal(10), decimal(3), decimal(0) ] | extend div = d / decimal(3), gt = gettype(d)
Sql: SELECT *, d / 3.0 AS div, CASE WHEN TYPEOF(d) IN ('TINYINT','SMALLINT','INTEGER','BIGINT','HUGEINT','UTINYINT','USMALLINT','UINTEGER','UBIGINT','UHUGEINT') THEN 'long' WHEN TYPEOF(d) IN ('FLOAT','DOUBLE','REAL') OR TYPEOF(d) LIKE 'DECIMAL%' THEN 'real' WHEN TYPEOF(d) = 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN TYPEOF(d) = 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN TYPEOF(d) IN ('TIMESTAMP','DATE','TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE','TIMESTAMP_NS','TIMESTAMP_MS','TIMESTAMP_S') THEN 'datetime' WHEN TYPEOF(d) LIKE 'INTERVAL%' THEN 'timespan' WHEN TYPEOF(d) = 'UUID' THEN 'guid' WHEN TYPEOF(d) LIKE '%[]' OR TYPEOF(d) LIKE 'STRUCT%' OR TYPEOF(d) LIKE 'MAP%' THEN 'array' WHEN TYPEOF(d) = 'JSON' THEN (CASE WHEN json_type(CAST(d AS VARCHAR)) = 'ARRAY' THEN 'array' ELSE 'dictionary' END) ELSE LOWER(TYPEOF(d)) END AS gt FROM (VALUES (10.0), (3.0), (0.0)) AS t(d)

Kql: print h2i = toint("0xFF"), h2l = tolong("0x10")
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('0xFF' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('0xFF' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS h2i, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('0x10' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('0x10' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS h2l

Kql: print cast_chain = toint(tostring(tolong(toint("42"))))
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('42' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('42' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('42' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('42' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS TEXT) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('42' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('42' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('42' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('42' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS TEXT) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS cast_chain

Kql: datatable(l:long)[ 100, 7, 13 ] | extend asint = toint(l), back = tolong(toint(l)), mod = l % 6
Sql: SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(l AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(l AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS asint, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(l AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(l AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(l AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(l AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS back, (((l) % NULLIF(6, 0)) + ABS(6)) % NULLIF(6, 0) AS mod FROM (VALUES (CAST(100 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(7 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(13 AS BIGINT))) AS t(l)

Kql: print mixmod = 7.5 % 2, mixmod2 = 7 % 2.5, negmod = -7.5 % 2
Sql: SELECT 7.5 % 2 AS mixmod, 7 % 2.5 AS mixmod2, (-7.5) % 2 AS negmod

Kql: datatable(r:real)[ 3.14159, -3.14159, 0.5, -0.5 ] | extend c = toint(r), fl = bin(r, 1)
Sql: SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(r AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(r AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS c, FLOOR((r)/(1))*(1) AS fl FROM (VALUES (CAST(3.14159 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(-3.14159 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(0.5 AS DOUBLE)), (CAST(-0.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(r)

Kql: print empty1 = toint(""), empty2 = todouble(""), empty3 = tolong(""), empty4 = tobool("")
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS empty1, COALESCE(TRY_CAST('' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS empty2, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS empty3, TRY_CAST('' AS BOOLEAN) AS empty4

Kql: print nanarith = real(nan) + 1, nanmul = real(nan) * 0, infarith = real(+inf) - real(+inf)
Sql: SELECT CAST('nan' AS DOUBLE) + 1 AS nanarith, CAST('nan' AS DOUBLE) * 0 AS nanmul, CAST('inf' AS DOUBLE) - CAST('inf' AS DOUBLE) AS infarith

Kql: print comp1 = real(nan) == real(nan), comp2 = real(nan) != real(nan), comp3 = real(+inf) > 1e308
Sql: SELECT CAST('nan' AS DOUBLE) = CAST('nan' AS DOUBLE) AS comp1, CAST('nan' AS DOUBLE) IS DISTINCT FROM CAST('nan' AS DOUBLE) AS comp2, CAST('inf' AS DOUBLE) > 1E+308 AS comp3
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=(False, True, True) duck=(True, False, True)

Kql: datatable(i:int, r:real)[ 5,2.0, 7,0.0, -3,1.5 ] | extend sum = i + r, type = gettype(i + r), prod = i * r
Sql: SELECT *, i + r AS sum, CASE WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) IN ('TINYINT','SMALLINT','INTEGER','BIGINT','HUGEINT','UTINYINT','USMALLINT','UINTEGER','UBIGINT','UHUGEINT') THEN 'long' WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) IN ('FLOAT','DOUBLE','REAL') OR TYPEOF(i + r) LIKE 'DECIMAL%' THEN 'real' WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) = 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) = 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) IN ('TIMESTAMP','DATE','TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE','TIMESTAMP_NS','TIMESTAMP_MS','TIMESTAMP_S') THEN 'datetime' WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) LIKE 'INTERVAL%' THEN 'timespan' WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) = 'UUID' THEN 'guid' WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) LIKE '%[]' OR TYPEOF(i + r) LIKE 'STRUCT%' OR TYPEOF(i + r) LIKE 'MAP%' THEN 'array' WHEN TYPEOF(i + r) = 'JSON' THEN (CASE WHEN json_type(CAST(i + r AS VARCHAR)) = 'ARRAY' THEN 'array' ELSE 'dictionary' END) ELSE LOWER(TYPEOF(i + r)) END AS type, i * r AS prod FROM (VALUES (5, CAST(2.0 AS DOUBLE)), (7, CAST(0.0 AS DOUBLE)), (-3, CAST(1.5 AS DOUBLE))) AS t(i, r)

Kql: print longtrunc = tolong(9.99), longtrunc2 = tolong(-9.99), inttrunc = toint(9.99)
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(9.99 AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(9.99 AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS longtrunc, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST((-9.99) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST((-9.99) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS longtrunc2, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(9.99 AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(9.99 AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS inttrunc

Kql: datatable(x:dynamic)[ dynamic(1), dynamic(1.5), dynamic("3"), dynamic(true), dynamic(null) ] | extend ti = toint(x), td = todouble(x), ts = tostring(x)
Sql: SELECT *, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(x AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS ti, COALESCE(TRY_CAST(x AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(x AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS td, TRY_CAST(x AS TEXT) AS ts FROM (VALUES ('1'::JSON), ('1.5'::JSON), ('"3"'::JSON), ('true'::JSON), (NULL)) AS t(x)

Kql: print parseint = toint("  42  "), parsereal = todouble("  3.14  ")
Sql: SELECT TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST('  42  ' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('  42  ' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS INTEGER) AS parseint, COALESCE(TRY_CAST('  3.14  ' AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST('  3.14  ' AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE)) AS parsereal

Kql: print decdiv = decimal(1) / decimal(3), decmul = decimal(0.1) + decimal(0.2)
Sql: SELECT 1.0 / 3.0 AS decdiv, 0.1 + 0.2 AS decmul

Kql: datatable(l:long)[ 5, 0, -5 ] | extend asbool = tobool(l), back = tolong(tobool(l))
Sql: SELECT *, TRY_CAST(l AS BOOLEAN) AS asbool, TRY_CAST(TRUNC(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(l AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE), TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(l AS BOOLEAN) AS BOOLEAN) AS DOUBLE))) AS BIGINT) AS back FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(0 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(-5 AS BIGINT))) AS t(l)
